original: At first glance this weapon seems to only be the hilt of a dagger, but this handle hides a hardlight projector that protrudes a razor-sharp blade made of photons that heat the air around them. Ultra-lightweight due to its lack of a physical blade, and highly concealable, this weapon is perfect for any rogue in need of a holdout weapon for close encounters of the third kind.
